customer_name.description: Display name on the email greeting.

flags.description: Comma-separated account flags (e.g., 'repeat_disputer', 'high_value_account', 'high_value_account, repeat_disputer'). Use 'none' or empty string when no flags apply.

invoice_number.description: Exact invoice ID; must appear verbatim in subject and body.

dispute_description.description: The customer's own words from the portal submission.

root_cause.description: Analyst root-cause finding for the dispute.

recommended_resolution.description: Recommended downstream action for this dispute.

line_items_summary.description: One-line description of impacted line items (e.g., '2 line items, HR Coil HSN 7208').

adjustment_type.description: What the upstream subflow posted to the ERP.

adjustment_id.description: Adjustment identifier(s) (e.g., 'CM-2026-001234' or 'REV-INV-2026-005678'). For adjustment_type 'both', pass both IDs comma-separated.

credit_amount.description: Credit amount in INR. Zero for pure tax-type corrections.

adjusted_invoice_balance.description: Remaining balance on the original invoice post-adjustment, in INR.

subject.description: Specific subject line referencing the invoice number and the nature of the resolution.

body.description: Full email body, greeting through sign-off, plain text.
